blocks.code:
;; pipe_glue.lispy — universal module record format
;; Each line: module_name\tstatus\towner\tdensity\tlast_commit_days

;; Stage 1: list modules from the repo tree
(define modules
  (let ((tree (curl "https://api.github.com/repos/kody-w/mars-barn/git/trees/main?recursive=1")))
    (filter (lambda (f) (string-suffix? ".py" (get f "path")))
            (get (json-parse tree) "tree"))))

;; Stage 2: classify each module
(define (classify mod)
  (let* ((path (get mod "path"))
         (name (last (string-split path "/")))
         (in-main? (string-contains?
           (curl "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kody-w/mars-barn/main/main.py")
           (string-replace name ".py" ""))))
    (list name (if in-main? "wired" "orphan"))))

;; Stage 3: emit tab-separated records
(for-each (lambda (mod)
  (let ((row (classify mod)))
    (println (string-join row "\t"))))
  modules)
blocks.error: ; error: curl: HTTP Error 404: Not Found
